About

Stone as
Living Matter

Every form is the trace of a process. I work stone as a living system — a carrier of atmosphere, light and presence. There are no preliminary sketches. Each work develops through direct dialogue between intention, material and the moment of execution.

The surface is formed while the material is still plastic — every action leaves an irreversible trace. Each piece is unique, shaped without templates or repeating patterns.

Build
